summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing for ManoProtect local SEO landing pages (Madrid, Barcelona, Sevilla, Valencia). All 12 features tested and verified. All 4 local pages render correctly with hero sections, benefits, testimonials, coverage zones, and CTAs. All CTA buttons navigate to /servicios-sos. All WhatsApp buttons have correct city-specific links. SEO meta tags and LocalBusiness schema.org JSON-LD present on all pages. Regression tests pass for home, sentinel-x, and blog pages.
passed_tests: TEST 1: /boton-sos-madrid - Hero section (hero-madrid), H1 'Botón SOS en Madrid – Entrega y Soporte Local', Benefits, Testimonials, Coverage zones, CTA button
TEST 2: /boton-sos-barcelona - Hero section (hero-barcelona), H1 'Botón SOS en Barcelona – Entrega y Soporte Local', Benefits, Testimonials, Coverage zones, CTA button
TEST 3: /boton-sos-sevilla - Hero section (hero-sevilla), H1 'Botón SOS en Sevilla – Entrega y Soporte Local', Benefits, Testimonials, Coverage zones, CTA button
TEST 4: /boton-sos-valencia (regression) - Hero section (hero-valencia), H1 'Botón SOS en Valencia – Entrega y Soporte Local', Benefits, Testimonials, Coverage zones, CTA button
TEST 5: Breadcrumb navigation - All 4 pages have correct breadcrumbs (Madrid: Inicio/Madrid, Barcelona: Inicio/Barcelona, Sevilla: Inicio/Sevilla, Valencia: Inicio/Botón SOS/Valencia)
TEST 6: CTA buttons navigation - All 4 CTAs (cta-comprar-madrid, cta-comprar-barcelona, cta-comprar-sevilla, cta-comprar-valencia) navigate to /servicios-sos
TEST 7: WhatsApp buttons - All 4 pages have city-specific WhatsApp links (WhatsApp Madrid, WhatsApp Barcelona, WhatsApp Sevilla, WhatsApp Valencia)
TEST 8: SEO meta tags - All 4 pages have title, description, canonical URL with city names
TEST 9: LocalBusiness schema.org - All 4 pages have JSON-LD LocalBusiness schema with city-specific data
TEST 10: Home page regression - Loads correctly with header, footer, H1 present
TEST 11: /sentinel-x regression - Loads correctly with price (149€), CTA, and product info
TEST 12: /blog regression - Loads correctly with 25 blog articles listed
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 local SEO landing pages fully verified: /boton-sos-madrid, /boton-sos-barcelona, /boton-sos-sevilla, /boton-sos-valencia. Each page has: hero section with data-testid, city-specific H1, benefits section with city stats, testimonials section with local customers, coverage zones, CTA button linking to /servicios-sos, WhatsApp button with city in URL, SEO meta tags (title, description, canonical), LocalBusiness schema.org JSON-LD. Regression tests pass for /, /sentinel-x, /blog. City accent colors: Madrid=red, Barcelona=blue, Sevilla=amber, Valencia=orange.
